import React, { useState } from 'react' import {Container, LogoContainer, Menu, MobileIcon, Wrapper, DropDownContent, DropDownLi, StyledSubMenu, SubMenu } from './Narbar.elements'; import {FaBars, FaTimes} from "react-icons/fa"; import { IconContext } from 'react-icons'; import styled from 'styled-components'; import { FaHome, FaFileInvoice, FaIndustry, FaChartLine, FaStar, FaTools, FaBuilding} from 'react-icons/fa'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const Icon = styled.span` padding-right: 10px; font-size: 15px; `; const Navbar = () => { const [showMobileMenu, setShowMobileMenu] = useState(false); return ( setShowMobileMenu(!showMobileMenu)}> { showMobileMenu ? : }
